content.query:
use nyctaxi_db

-- Build the silver layer for 2024
-- This reads all bronze parquet files, cleans them,
-- and writes clean parquet files into silver/

IF EXISTS (SELECT * FROM sys.external_tables WHERE name = 'silver_yellow_trips_2024')
    DROP EXTERNAL TABLE silver_yellow_trips_2024;


-- Now create the silver table
CREATE EXTERNAL TABLE silver_yellow_trips_2024
WITH (
    LOCATION     = 'yellow_taxi/year=2024/',
    DATA_SOURCE  = silver_source,
    FILE_FORMAT  = parquet_format
)
AS
SELECT
    -- Core trip identifiers
    VendorID,

    -- Timestamps
    tpep_pickup_datetime                                          AS pickup_datetime,
    tpep_dropoff_datetime                                         AS dropoff_datetime,

    -- trip duration in minutes
    -- This derived field does not exist in bronze
    DATEDIFF(MINUTE, tpep_pickup_datetime, tpep_dropoff_datetime) AS trip_duration_mins,

    -- Location
    PULocationID                                                  AS pickup_location_id,
    DOLocationID                                                  AS dropoff_location_id,

    -- Trip metrics
    passenger_count,
    trip_distance,
    RatecodeID,

    -- Financial
    fare_amount,
    extra,
    mta_tax,
    tip_amount,
    tolls_amount,
    improvement_surcharge,
    congestion_surcharge,
    total_amount,
    Airport_fee,

    -- Payment
    payment_type

FROM OPENROWSET(
    BULK 'https://adlsnyctaxide.dfs.core.windows.net/bronze/yellow_taxi/year=2024/*/*.parquet',
    FORMAT = 'PARQUET'
) AS src

-- Silver cleaning rules — every WHERE condition has a reason
WHERE
    passenger_count > 0              -- removes 140,162 vendor-gap rows + zero-passenger rows
    AND trip_distance > 0            -- removes physically impossible negative distances
    AND fare_amount > 0              -- removes zero and negative fares (data entry errors)
    AND tpep_pickup_datetime >= '2024-01-01'   -- removes out-of-range dates
    AND tpep_pickup_datetime <  '2025-01-01'   -- removes future-dated records
    AND DATEDIFF(MINUTE,
        tpep_pickup_datetime,
        tpep_dropoff_datetime) BETWEEN 1 AND 300;  -- trips between 1 min and 5 hours
